title: WarpDL GUI Feature Specification
description: Feature specification for the WarpDL desktop GUI, derived from the daemon IPC API. The GUI connects to the daemon via the primary binary protocol (length-prefixed JSON over Unix socket / named pipe / TCP) or the secondary JSON-RPC 2.0 WebSocket API.

primary.description: Custom binary length-prefixed protocol over socket/pipe/TCP
primary.wire_format: 4-byte little-endian uint32 payload length, followed by JSON payload bytes

secondary.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP POST and WebSocket with push notifications
secondary.auth: Bearer token (constant-time comparison, empty secret disables RPC)

daemon_connection.title: Daemon Connection Management
daemon_connection.description: Connect to, monitor, and manage the WarpDL daemon process

sub_features.title: Auto-connect on launch
sub_features.description: Attempt connection to daemon via platform-preferred transport (unix socket, named pipe, TCP fallback). Show connection status indicator in the UI.
sub_features.notes: Use same transport selection logic as CLI: unix socket -> TCP fallback on Linux/macOS; named pipe -> TCP fallback on Windows.

sub_features.title: Auto-start daemon
sub_features.description: If daemon is not running on launch, offer to start it. The daemon binary is the same warpdl executable with 'daemon' subcommand.
sub_features.notes: Spawn 'warpdl daemon' as background process. Wait for socket to become available.

sub_features.title: Version mismatch detection
sub_features.description: Query daemon version on connect and warn if GUI version differs.

sub_features.title: Connection status indicator
sub_features.description: Persistent UI element showing daemon connection state: connected, disconnected, reconnecting.

download_management.title: Download Management
download_management.description: Add, monitor, pause, resume, and remove downloads

sub_features.title: Add new download
sub_features.description: Dialog to add a new download by URL with configurable options. Supports HTTP/HTTPS/FTP/FTPS/SFTP protocols.

disable_work_stealing.description: Disable dynamic work stealing between segments

ssh_key_path.description: SSH private key for SFTP downloads

cookies_from.description: Cookie source: file path, 'auto' for browser auto-detect, or empty

ui_components: URL input field with paste/drag-drop support
Directory picker for save location
Collapsible 'Advanced Options' section for connections, segments, proxy, headers, speed limit, timeout, retries
Priority selector (Low / Normal / High)
Cookie import option (auto-detect / file path)

sub_features.title: Schedule download
sub_features.description: Schedule a download for later execution, either one-shot or recurring via cron.
ui_components: Date/time picker for one-shot scheduling
Cron expression builder for recurring downloads
Visual preview of next trigger time

sub_features.title: Stop/pause download
sub_features.description: Stop an active download or cancel a scheduled download.
sub_features.response: null on active stop; string message on schedule cancellation
sub_features.notes: Cancelling a scheduled download sets its state to 'cancelled'. Stopping an active download preserves partial data for resume.

sub_features.title: Resume download
sub_features.description: Resume a previously paused or interrupted download.

sub_features.title: Delete download
sub_features.description: Remove a download from the manager and optionally delete its data.

download_id.description: Specific download hash; empty = flush all completed

ui_components: Confirmation dialog
Option to delete downloaded file from disk
Bulk flush for all completed downloads

sub_features.title: Attach to active download
sub_features.description: Subscribe to real-time progress updates of an already-running download (e.g. when reopening the GUI while a download is in progress).
sub_features.notes: Does NOT start a download. Joins the broadcast group for an active download. Fails if download is not running.

download_list.title: Download List View
download_list.description: Main view showing all downloads with status, progress, and actions

sub_features.title: List downloads
sub_features.description: Fetch and display all downloads with filtering by status.
ui_components: Sortable table/list with columns: Name, Size, Progress, Speed, Status, Date Added
Filter tabs: Active / Pending / Completed / Scheduled / All
Search/filter by filename
Context menu per item: Resume, Stop, Delete, Copy URL, Open File, Open Folder
Bulk selection with multi-action toolbar

sub_features.title: Item status derivation
sub_features.description: Derive display status from item fields since there is no explicit status field.

status_logic.paused: downloaded > 0 AND NOT downloading AND NOT completed
status_logic.pending: downloaded == 0 AND NOT downloading AND NOT scheduled

realtime_progress.title: Real-Time Download Progress
realtime_progress.description: Live progress tracking via async broadcasts from the daemon

sub_features.title: Download progress tracking
sub_features.description: Process UPDATE_DOWNLOADING broadcasts to update UI in real-time.

resume_progress.description: Bytes recovered from existing partial data during resume

download_progress.ui_update: Increment progress bar, update speed calculation, update ETA

download_complete.ui_update: Show completion state, play notification sound, show system notification
download_complete.notes: hash == 'main' indicates the entire download is complete, not just a segment

download_stopped.ui_update: Show paused state, enable Resume button

compile_start.description: A segment is being merged into the output file

ui_components: Per-download progress bar with percentage
Download speed (bytes/sec) with rolling average
ETA calculation based on speed and remaining bytes
Segment visualization showing individual part progress
Total downloaded / total size display

sub_features.title: Error handling from broadcasts
sub_features.description: Handle error responses pushed via the broadcast channel.
sub_features.ui_update: Show error toast/notification, mark download as errored, offer retry option

queue_management.title: Download Queue Management
queue_management.description: View and control the priority download queue

sub_features.title: Queue status view
sub_features.description: Display current queue state including active and waiting downloads.
ui_components: Queue overview panel: active count / max concurrent / waiting count
Pause/Resume queue toggle button
Waiting list with drag-to-reorder or move buttons
Priority badge per queued item (Low/Normal/High with color coding)

sub_features.title: Pause/resume queue
sub_features.description: Pause the queue to prevent new downloads from auto-starting, or resume it.

sub_features.title: Reorder queue
sub_features.description: Move a queued download to a different position in the waiting list.
ui_components: Drag-and-drop reordering in waiting list
Move to top / Move to bottom buttons

extension_management.title: Extension Management
extension_management.description: Install, configure, and manage JavaScript URL-transformation extensions

sub_features.title: Install extension

path.description: Filesystem path to JS extension file

ui_components: File picker dialog for .js extension files

sub_features.title: Activate/deactivate extension
ui_components: Toggle switch per extension in the list

sub_features.title: Delete extension
ui_components: Delete button with confirmation dialog

sub_features.title: Download complete notification
sub_features.description: Show OS-level notification when a download finishes. Include filename and save path. Click to open file/folder.

sub_features.title: Download error notification
sub_features.description: Show OS-level notification on download failure. Include error message and offer retry action.

sub_features.title: Scheduled download triggered notification
sub_features.trigger: Scheduled download starts (ScheduleState changes from 'scheduled' to 'triggered')
sub_features.description: Notify when a scheduled download begins executing.

settings.title: Settings/Preferences
settings.description: GUI-local settings that map to IPC request parameters

sub_features.title: Auto-start daemon
sub_features.description: Automatically start daemon if not running on GUI launch

sub_features.title: Daemon connection URI
sub_features.description: Override daemon URI (unix:///path, tcp://host:port, pipe://name)

sub_features.title: Cookie auto-import
sub_features.description: Default cookie import behavior for new downloads

batch_download.title: Batch Download
batch_download.description: Add multiple downloads at once from a URL list

sub_features.title: Import URL list
sub_features.description: Parse a text file with one URL per line (# for comments) and create downloads for each.
ui_components: File picker for .txt URL list
Textarea for pasting URLs directly
Preview list with per-URL options override
Shared settings (directory, connections, priority) applied to all

jsonrpc_websocket.title: JSON-RPC 2.0 WebSocket Integration (Alternative Transport)
jsonrpc_websocket.description: Alternative transport for GUI clients that prefer standard JSON-RPC over the custom binary protocol. Provides push notifications for real-time updates.
jsonrpc_websocket.auth: Bearer <secret> in first message or HTTP header

ScheduleState.missed: Trigger time passed while daemon was down
